summary: Ayurvedic/wellness blog website with homepage, blue-green theme, logo, blog with image upload, comment section, and category pages. Admin panel blog post visibility issue being investigated.
known_issues: Blog posts not showing in admin panel

existing_features.title: Ensure the admin panel uses the correct React Query hook that fetches ALL blog posts (including unpublished drafts), not just published posts, so admins can manage all content.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix admin panel so blog posts display and can be edited properly
Fix the admin panel (AdminPostsPage) so that all blog posts are fetched and displayed correctly in the posts list table, including posts created via the Create Blog Post form.

Verify and fix the backend getAllPosts (or equivalent) method to correctly return all blog posts to admin callers, ensuring the Motoko actor's access control does not accidentally filter out posts for anonymous or non-admin callers when accessed from the admin panel.
